research_objective: Evaluate how well AI language models preserve Information Integrity and Cultural Fidelity during faithful transformation of existing source material.
research_question: How well are Information Integrity and Cultural Fidelity preserved when language models perform faithful transformations of source material with varying levels of cultural and contextual complexity?
hypothesis: Structured faithful-transformation prompting will improve preservation of Information Integrity and Cultural Fidelity by reducing hallucinations, context omission, attribution failures, framing shifts, and culturally significant distortions.
experiment_rationale: This experiment establishes the baseline validation of the proposed evaluation framework using benchmark documents representing increasing contextual and cultural complexity.

transformation_task.name: Faithful Transformation
transformation_task.instructions: Produce a concise professional summary while preserving factual accuracy, attribution, chronology, uncertainty, competing perspectives, and culturally significant context.
